name_en: 🆕 Style: M12587 With variable code chip
name_cn:
🆕 Style: M12587 With variable code chip
 This small Montsouris backpack features shiny calfskin with Monogram details, subtly expressing the LV Vibe series identity. The Road Heritage buckle and leather drawstring add functional design, while the distinctive metal hardware makes a finishing touch. The front zip pocket keeps small items secure.
 28 x 30 x 18 cm
(L x H x W)
